name: Priya Shrestha
short: NihonPath made my dream of studying in Tokyo completely achievable. Every step was handled with care.
full: I had always dreamed of studying in Japan but had no idea where to start. Abroad Sewa guided me from the very beginning — they helped me choose the right university based on my grades, prepared all my documents, and even coached me for the visa interview. I got my visa approved on the first try and now I am studying Engineering at Waseda University. I cannot thank them enough.

name: Aakash Gurung
short: The visa process felt overwhelming but their team handled everything and I got approved first try.
full: I was worried about the visa documentation — there were so many requirements. But the team at Abroad Sewa was incredibly thorough. They prepared my financial statements, wrote my cover letter, and reviewed everything multiple times before submission. I got my Australian student visa within 4 weeks. Highly professional team.

name: Sita Tamang
short: I received a full MEXT scholarship thanks to their guidance. I genuinely could not have done it alone.
full: Abroad Sewa helped me apply for the MEXT Japanese Government Scholarship. The process was very competitive but their counselors knew exactly what the selection committee looks for. They helped me write my research proposal and prepare for the embassy exam. I was selected and now study fully funded at Kyoto University. Life-changing experience.

name: Rajesh Adhikari
short: The Japanese language classes here are amazing. I went from zero to N4 in just 8 months.
full: I joined Abroad Sewa specifically for their Japanese language program. The teachers are native-level speakers and the curriculum is very structured. In 8 months I passed JLPT N4 and was accepted into a language school in Tokyo. Their classes are small so every student gets personal attention.

name: Manisha Karki
short: They made the entire Canada application process so smooth. Got my visa faster than expected.
full: Moving to Canada seemed like a distant dream. Abroad Sewa turned it into reality. From IELTS preparation referrals to SOP writing and financial documentation, everything was done meticulously. My visa was approved in just 3 weeks. I am now studying Commerce in Toronto and loving it. Thank you Abroad Sewa!

name: Bibek Thapa
short: Best consultancy in Kathmandu for Japan. Very honest, transparent, and genuinely helpful.
full: I visited three different consultancies before choosing Abroad Sewa. The difference was clear — they were honest about my profile, realistic about expectations, and never made empty promises. They matched me with the right institution in Osaka and my visa was approved. Now in my second year of CS. Very happy with the choice.

name: Anu Poudel
short: The counselors here truly care about students. Not just a business — they are like family.
full: What I love about Abroad Sewa is how personally invested the counselors are. My counselor followed up every week before departure and even helped me find a part-time job once I arrived in Sapporo through their alumni network. This kind of after-care is rare and I deeply appreciate it.

name: Suman Bhandari
short: Got into University of Manchester with a partial scholarship — couldn't have done it without them.
full: Abroad Sewa helped me with my UK UCAS application and personal statement for a Master's in Data Science. They knew exactly what admissions teams in the UK look for. I received an offer from University of Manchester along with a partial scholarship. The investment in their services paid back multiple times over.

name: Nisha Rai
short: They guided me through the entire PhD research proposal process. Very knowledgeable staff.
full: Applying for a PhD in Japan requires a very specific research proposal and finding a suitable professor. Abroad Sewa's team helped me craft my research proposal and even assisted in communicating with potential professors at Hokkaido University. I successfully found a supervisor and got accepted. Their academic guidance is exceptional.

name: Ramesh Chaudhary
short: Good counseling, great language classes. My Japanese improved a lot before I even left Nepal.
full: The Japanese language coaching at Abroad Sewa is top-notch. By the time I left for Osaka, I could hold basic conversations in Japanese. This made my adjustment to life in Japan much easier. The teachers are dedicated and the small class sizes mean you actually learn.

name: Deepa Maharjan
short: Very transparent about fees and processes. No hidden charges or surprises — refreshing!
full: I had bad experiences with other consultancies that had hidden fees. Abroad Sewa was completely transparent from day one. They gave me a clear breakdown of all costs and what services were included. Everything went exactly as they promised. I am now at Bond University in Australia and could not be happier.

name: Kiran Bista
short: From application to landing in Japan — they were with me every step. Truly grateful.
full: Abroad Sewa managed my entire journey — university application, COE, visa, flight, and even helped me find shared accommodation in Fukuoka before I arrived. When I landed, I already knew my route from the airport to my dormitory because they briefed me so well. This level of support is extraordinary.
